The PC Laboratory is located on the 2nd floor of Block B with a capacity of 35 computers and a smart board in an area of 60

m2

. Programs for programming, mathematical calculation, graphic design, electronic circuit simulation, video editing are installed on the computer in the laboratory.

Possibilities of Use of Pc Laboratory

Courses such as Data Journalism, Editing Techniques, Modeling and Simulation, Introduction to Programming, Web Programming, Visual Programming, Numerical Analysis, Digital Content Production and Digital Signal Processing are taught in the PC Laboratory.

The computer laboratory is a laboratory where not only undergraduate but also graduate students work with their instructors in their thesis studies, projects and research.
